design_philosophy: High-fashion editorial aesthetic inspired by Vogue Arabia. Utilizes the Swiss Brutalist tension of high-contrast fonts (Cormorant Garamond vs geometric sans). Generous negative space and asymmetric bento grids for a premium, non-templated feel.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis for smooth scrolling momentum.
motion_and_interaction.hover_cards: group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-700 ease-out. Use subtle scale up for inner images: group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-1000 ease-out.
motion_and_interaction.buttons: Hover state must invert colors (bg-transparent border-[#D4AF37] to bg-[#D4AF37] text-black) or add glow.

loader.description: Full-screen dark noir background. Brand name 'SheStylish' draws in elegantly (framer-motion text reveal) or fades in slowly with gold tint. Slides up out of viewport (-y 100%) after 2.5 seconds.

navigation.style: Fixed to top. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0908]/60. 1px bottom border-white/5. Minimalist links, center logo in Cormorant Garamond. Instagram link on the right.

hero_split.layout: min-h-screen pt-24. Desktop: 2-column grid. Left: massive typographic statement ('Editorial Elegance') + WhatsApp CTA. Right: Tall aspect ratio container with SVG abaya silhouette sketch.
hero_split.visuals: Use image 'abaya_sketch' or inline SVG for the right column. Left column background should be pure noir with subtle gold gradient blur hidden behind the text.
hero_split.cta: Primary button, gold border, white text, uppercase overline. Hover: solid gold bg, black text. Opens WhatsApp deep link.

scrolling_marquee.layout: Full width, bg-transparent or very dark surface. py-6 border-y border-white/10.
scrolling_marquee.typography: Cormorant Garamond, text-3xl md:text-5xl, text-[#D4AF37], italic mixed with regular.
scrolling_marquee.content: Oman ✦ UAE ✦ Saudi Arabia ✦ Kuwait ✦ Qatar ✦ Bahrain

collections_grid.layout: Bento Grid Mode A. 4 cards. 2 large (col-span-12 md:col-span-6, tall aspect ratio), 2 smaller or staggered. Generous gaps.
collections_grid.cards: Cardless aesthetic. Just the image/SVG wrapper and text below it. Use abstract luxury textures or the Abaya Sketch image if SVG not provided. Hover reveals 'View on WhatsApp' button.
collections_grid.visuals: Since 'no real product photos yet', use elegant inline SVG paths of abayas centered in tall dark containers with subtle border-[#D4AF37]/20.

how_it_works.layout: 4-step process. Vertical on mobile, horizontal zig-zag or timeline on desktop.
how_it_works.typography: Step numbers in massive Cormorant Garamond (text-7xl) at 10% opacity behind the step text.
how_it_works.content: 1. Browse Collection 2. Select Style 3. WhatsApp Booking 4. Secure Delivery (GCC).

testimonials.layout: Minimalist centered slider or masonry bento. Deep surface background.
testimonials.typography: Large italicized Cormorant Garamond for the quote. Outfit for the author. Gold colored oversized quotation marks.
testimonials.author: Include 'Muscat, Oman', 'Dubai, UAE' as tracking-[0.2em] overlines.

whatsapp_booking_section.layout: Bottom heavy CTA section. Large card with glassmorphism or solid dark grey.
whatsapp_booking_section.visuals: Minimalist form/button. Include GCC country flags (SVG/emoji) below the CTA to build regional trust.
whatsapp_booking_section.cta: Massive 'Book Now' button linking to WhatsApp.

instagram_grid.layout: 9-grid (3x3). No gaps (gap-0) or 1px gap. Group hover effects.
instagram_grid.visuals: Use the provided abstract dark luxury textures for placeholder images. On hover, grayscale turns to color, or subtle zoom.

footer.layout: py-24. Large brand name at the bottom (text-[10vw]).

floating_whatsapp.style: Fixed bottom-right. z-50. Gold background, black icon. Subtle pulsing animation (animate-pulse or ping on a backdrop ring).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (WhatsApp buttons, nav links, collection cards) MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-hero-btn', data-testid='nav-instagram-link').

images.description: Vogue editorial minimalist sketch of an abaya. Use in hero section.
Dark noir fabric with metallic gold threads. Use as a subtle section background (e.g., for testimonials or Instagram section backdrop).
Abstract dark geometric pattern with golden accents for Insta grid.
Elegant abstract black satin fabric for Insta grid.
Dark green/noir luxury fabric for Insta grid.

assets.icons: lucide-react for UI icons (Chevron, Menu). react-icons (FaWhatsapp, FaInstagram) for social logos.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic Shadcn components for the layout (Card, Section, etc.). Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural asymmetry.
Ensure all backgrounds are tinted with a slight warm hue (#0A0908) rather than pure black (#000000) to keep it luxurious.
For the SVG abayas in the collection section, if you cannot use the provided sketch image, generate elegant, minimalist inline SVG paths of flowing dresses.
Use framer-motion for the loader and entrance animations. Use react-fast-marquee for the scrolling text.
In the Instagram grid section, use the provided placeholder texture images since real photos are unavailable.
Make sure all booking buttons link to the exact WhatsApp URL provided in assets.
Include data-testid attributes on all buttons and navigation links.
